'''nahaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psammosteid|psammosteid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psammosteid|psammosteid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nahaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næhægæth|næhægæth]] || [[word:næhægæj|næhægæj]] || [[word:næhægæsh|næhægæsh]] || [[word:næhægæ|næhægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nahahagath|nahahagath]] || [[word:nahahagaj|nahahagaj]] || [[word:nahahagash|nahahagash]] || [[word:nahahaga|nahahaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nahagath|nahagath]] || [[word:nahagaj|nahagaj]] || [[word:nahagash|nahagash]] || [[word:nahaga|nahaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nahafgath|nahafgath]] || [[word:nahafgaj|nahafgaj]] || [[word:nahafgash|nahafgash]] || [[word:nahafgaf|nahafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nahagatha|nahagatha]] || [[word:nahagaja|nahagaja]] || [[word:nahagasha|nahagasha]] || [[word:nahagaka|nahagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nahagath|nahagath]] || [[word:nahagaj|nahagaj]] || [[word:nahagash|nahagash]] || [[word:nahaga|nahaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nahagathal|nahagathal]] || [[word:nahagajal|nahagajal]] || [[word:nahagashal|nahagashal]] || [[word:nahagakal|nahagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nahagathatha|nahagathatha]] || [[word:nahagajaja|nahagajaja]] || [[word:nahagashasha|nahagashasha]] || [[word:nahagaka|nahagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nahagathan|nahagathan]] || [[word:nahagajan|nahagajan]] || [[word:nahagashan|nahagashan]] || [[word:nahagakan|nahagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nahagathaoro|nahagathaoro]] || [[word:nahagajaoro|nahagajaoro]] || [[word:nahagashaoro|nahagashaoro]] || [[word:nahagakaoro|nahagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
